title: Quiet Self-Repair And Drift Recovery Lane
goal: Implement issues #568-#574 so diagnostics classify recurring drift, expose affordance-shaped repair/manual-review actions, and route repeated repairs into improvement signals.
non_goals: Do not add provider-specific core dependencies.
Do not create a broad healing framework beyond the current concrete repair affordances.

intent.outcome: Diagnostics identify failed invariants, classify faults, offer safe repair or manual-review next actions, and feed repeated repair classes into improvement routing.
intent.constraints: Keep outputs compact, invocation-aware, implementation-agnostic, and compatible with existing workspace/planning commands.
intent.latitude: Prefer shaping existing doctor/defaults/report affordances over adding new commands.
intent.escalation: Stop if safe repair would require guessing human intent or destructive mutation.

execution.next_step: Implement repair taxonomy and structured doctor actions.
execution.proof: Focused pytest, proof selection, doctor/summary checks, make check.

invariants: Doctor output stays compact while JSON exposes actionable repair detail.
Copyable commands use resolved invocation policy.
Planning state holds current work only and is archived after completion.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: yes for the current open repair/drift issue lane if no new issues remain open
intent_continuity.continuation surface: none unless implementation discovers a new improvement lane

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Future diagnostics can route drift to repair, manual review, or improvement signals without requiring broad internal knowledge.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Automatic repair application for ambiguous/destructive cases.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: none unless proof or dogfooding finds a concrete improvement issue

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Finish the open repair/drift recovery lane end-to-end using package dogfooding.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that outputs are operational affordances, not diagnostic dumps.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: CLI/reporting tests and planning state for this lane.
execution_bounds.max changed files: small, but tests may require adjacent fixtures.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; make check
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Stop before broad CLI generation or package layout refactors.

stop_conditions.stop when: Issues #568-#574 are implemented, tested, closed, and archived.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: Repair would need destructive or ambiguous state mutation.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: New capability work beyond repair affordance shaping appears necessary.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: make check fails for reasons outside this lane.

context_budget.live working set: Issues #568-#574, doctor/defaults/report repair affordances, tests around workspace CLI.
context_budget.recoverable later: Issue bodies and archived prior plans.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan execution_run and summary before interruption.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implement repair taxonomy/defaults and doctor repair/manual-review actions.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Long test failure triage or broad command-design changes.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: End-to-end implementation of the open repair lane.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Resolved invocation, compact output, no ambiguous auto-repair.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact JSON field names and helper placement when tests and issue intent are satisfied.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A repair action cannot be made safe without a new command or policy decision.

active_milestone.scope: Taxonomy, doctor repair actions, deterministic helper recommendations, package bug signals, improvement routing, affordance output.

immediate_next_action: Implement repair taxonomy/defaults and structured doctor repair/manual-review actions.
invariants: Repair output has one primary next action when safe.
Repair actions include invariant, fault_class, risk, safe_to_apply, command/helper, dry-run/apply distinction, and proof_after.
Repeated repair classes can be consumed as improvement signals.
Planning state is cleaned up after closeout.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Repair taxonomy is compact and stable enough for diagnostics to reference.
Package-command-created invalid state is a distinct fault class.
open_questions_to_close: Which existing command should represent safe deterministic repair for generated/workspace surface drift?
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/repair-drift-recovery-lane.plan.json --format json
completion_criteria: Tests cover at least one safe repair action and one manual-review action.
Issues are closed and changes are committed/pushed.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented repair taxonomy/defaults, structured doctor repair and manual-review actions, top-level repair aggregation, package-command bug signal shape, and repair recurrence improvement routing.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace CLI diagnostics/defaults/text output, tests, and planning state
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; make check
execution_run.next step: Archive plan, close issues, commit and push.

finished_run_review.intent served: yes; diagnostics now classify faults, emit repair/manual actions, and route recurrence
finished_run_review.config compliance: copyable commands use resolved invocation policy

proof_report.proof achieved now: workspace, memory, and planning tests/lint/typecheck/format/payload/report/surface checks passed
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: make check completed successfully after focused workspace CLI tests and selected proof commands

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Implemented #568-#574 repair taxonomy, doctor repair/manual-review actions, repair recurrence improvement routing, package-command bug signal shape, root aggregation, and tests; make check passes.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Correct-by-design first, self-detecting second, self-repairing when safe, self-routing when repair needs judgment, self-improving when repeated.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Simplify existing affordances before adding new commands.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this reduce agent repair loops without adding first-contact overhead?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The current open repair/drift recovery lane is implemented and validated; no required continuation remains.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: make check passed; workspace CLI tests passed; planning doctor clean.
closure_check.reopen trigger: New repair drift issue, failed repair-output proof, or recurring repair class not covered by current taxonomy.

durable_residue.learned constraint: No new durable repo knowledge is needed beyond the shipped repair taxonomy/defaults, tests, and archived proof.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Repair recurrence should route through the new improvement-intake subtype instead of becoming planning history.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Repair/drift recovery diagnostics now have a compact taxonomy, structured doctor repair/manual-review actions, recurrence routing, and package-command bug signal shape.
execution_summary.resume from: archived execplan if future repair lane context is needed

signals fixed: planning-state schema warning caught during dogfooding and fixed before closeout

discard.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed for local execution detail.

generated_closeout.authority: derived adapter; intent_satisfaction, closure_check, proof_report, durable_residue, execution_run, and execution_summary remain authoritative
